testcase.name: testAddToWishlist

failure.message: Wishlist count must increase after add. Before=0 After=0 expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Wishlist count must increase after add. Before=0 After=0 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at testcase.name: testRemoveFromWishlist

failure.message: Wishlist must have item before remove expected [true] but found [false]

failure.message: Need item in wishlist before refresh expected [true] but found [false]
